title: native.directory.pick
description: Open the OS-native directory picker and return the user-selected absolute path. Cancellation is a non-error null response. Implemented over @tauri-apps/plugin-dialog with directory=true, multiple=false.

default_path.description: Optional absolute path to anchor the dialog. Honored where the host OS supports it. Silently ignored when the path does not exist.

path.description: Absolute OS-canonical path the user selected, or null when the user cancelled the dialog.

cancelled.description: True when the user dismissed the dialog without selecting. Mirrors path === null.

picker.unavailable.description: The host environment does not provide a native directory picker (e.g. browser-only build without the build-flag stub enabled).

os.command_failed.description: The OS-native dialog returned an unexpected failure (e.g. permission denied by the OS, capability allowlist missing). Cancellation is NOT an error.

notes.description: Implementation notes consumed by the audit and UI layers.
